title: astragalus capitatus
intro: Astragalus capitatus, also known as sweet vetch or milk vetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus capitatus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving immune function, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus capitatus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
